subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! It is eventide and the sun is setting, yet the Sun of the love of God is at its zenith in the realm of the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی وقت شام است و آفتاب رو به افول ولکن شمس محبت الله در اوج عالم قلب
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @symbolism of color and light, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation
